user.title: Configure Tranzy SCTP Iași
user.description: Enter your Tranzy.ai OpenData API key.

select_routes.title: Select Routes
select_routes.description: Select the routes you want to monitor. Trams are listed first, then buses.

select_stops.title: Select Stops
select_stops.description: Select your favorite stops. Only stops served by selected routes are shown.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Tranzy
reauth_confirm.description: Your Tranzy API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new key.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check your Tranzy.ai OpenData key.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Tranzy API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_agencies: No agencies returned by the Tranzy API.
error.no_routes: No routes found for SCTP Iași.
error.no_selection: Please select at least one item.
error.unknown: Unknown error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Tranzy account is already configured.

init.title: Tranzy Options
init.description: Change the routes you want to monitor.

select_stops.title: Select Stops
select_stops.description: Select your favorite stops for the selected routes.
